input.job_description:
Muhammad Bilal Amin  
+92-323-321-5863 | mbilal.amin@outlook.com | https://www.linkedin.com/in/muhammad -bilal-amin/  
Professional Experience            
Signify Pakistan (Formerly Philips Pakistan)          
Key Account Manager           Dec 2022 -Present  
• Managing total of 15 Accounts Including both End Users and Channel Partners for Retail & Hospitality Business Across Pakistan  
• Managing the largest EU account with approx. 700K EUR  business for Signify Pakistan.  
• Started engagement with 10 different new fashion retail potential accounts in line with Signify’s expansion strategy in R&H segment.  
• Delivered and exceeded both top line and bottom -line targets with 120% attainment in topline in Q4 2022 .  
Toyota Pakistan (Indus Motor Company)  
Assistant Manager Sales Planning  (Demand Planner)       Oct 2022 -Nov 202 2 
• Improved the efficiency of the planning cycle with timely delivery of forecasting and planning report by at least 10%  
• Made a reconciliation and availability tool for the better planning of CBU vehicles.   
• Improve the MOM CBU invoicing performance by 100%.  
• Strong coordination between marketing, sales,  and planning team to get the optimum demand forecast based on n+3 approach.  
Toyota Pakistan (Indus Motor Company)  
Assistant Manager Network Expansion        Jul 2022 - Oct 2022  
• Was part of the launch team for Toyota Gateway Motors  
• Ensure all the branding is accurately done before the dealership launch.  
• Learned and understood all the Toyota Policies and procedures for dealership opening.  
• Researched the current dealership data across Pakistan auto sector and crea ted a dashboard (Power BI) analyzing the dealership 
data in Pakistan in different metrics (dealership counts, geographies, average sales per dealership etc.) 
Signify Pakistan (Formerly Philips Pakistan)          
Commercial Support Specialist  (Product Market ing)      April 2021 -Jun 2022  
• Supported in Product Roadmap for the coming future portfolios.  
• Conducting a succes sful training  for SFDC to Sub Sahar a Afri ca Market with more than 17 pe ople in training.  
• Conducted anonymous market visits to get the primary insights of the current market/competition situation.  
• Hands on command on Vistex Tool, trained the PMs in Pakistan on the use of Vistex.  
• Communicating with the Marcom team regarding the ongoing and upcoming campaigns.  
• Achieved 15% improvement in data quality of pricing activities by collaborating with region al commercial operations team to 
achieve monthly targets.  
• Increased profitability by 10% by forecasting channel sales and IGM with 95% accuracy.  
• Improved decision ma king by providing comprehensive weekly performance reports to the commercial head, resulting in a 20% 
improvement.  
Signify Pakistan (Formerly Philips Pakistan)          
Sales Support Officer (Contractual)         Jul 2020 -Mar 2021  
• Coordinated national sales for professional lighting, resulting in 15% sales growth.  
• Improved sales team productivity by 20% as key user for Sales Force Dot Com  
• Provided weekly performance reports to commercial director, improving accuracy and timeliness by 25%  
• Improv ed sales and profitability forecasting accuracy by 5%, resulting in a 10% profit increase.  
Other Experience             
• Quantitative Instructor at Anees Hussain Pvt Limited (Dec 2017 – Present)  
• Marketing Intern at Signify Pakistan Limited (Feb 2020 - Jun 2020)  
• Marketing Intern at Hilton Pharma Pvt Limited (Jul 2019 - Aug 2019)  
• Trade and Revenue Management Intern at Sanofi Pakistan (Jul 2018 - Aug 2018)  
Education               
Master of Business Admi nistrations     | Institute of Business Administration, Karachi | In Progress  
Bachelor of Business Administrations | Institute of Business Administration, Karachi | 2016 -2020  
Skills               
Sales Management  | Data Analysis | Marketing Management  | Planning and Forecasting | Stakeholder Management | Operations Management
input.additional_info: InnovateCorp prefers candidates from leading business schools such as COMSATS Institute of Information and Technology. We support relocation for the right candidate and offer remote work opportunities. Skills are assessed through a combination of technical interviews and practical case studies, ensuring candidates meet our high standards of performance before offering a position.
minimum_requirements: Proficiency in CRM tools and Microsoft Office Suite
Proven track record in lead generation and client engagement
